title: 技改
summary: PVP小加强，但还是怕驱散，被逆翎暴打中等加强，不怕被抵抗了，但还是感觉没用，伤害不足。本来就很强，还加强。中等加强吧，让自己更快释放S3和智壳，但感觉拖到那时候，已经不好打了。大加强。提升了伤害，能驱散2个了buff了。大加强，效果抵抗和减伤都很棒，但启动有点慢啊，进肉队感觉挡不住核爆。但肉队内战
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿PVP"}],"customClass":"custom-block-style__type-7","customStyle":{"--custom-block-style-color":"#00B64F"}},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"2otfUq3zN6fGU4Oc","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_717/h_206/50364/253894/2025/8/23/983183.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"717px","height":"206px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小加强，但还是怕驱散，被逆翎暴打"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"MLav96PG1Hja3MMn","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_678/h_145/50364/253894/2025/8/23/949891.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"678px","height":"145px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"中等加强，不怕被抵抗了，但还是感觉没用，伤害不足。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"FMAtFOTQqJrsqVXM","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_691/h_141/50364/253894/2025/8/23/864328.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"691px","height":"141px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"本来就很强，还加强。中等加强吧，让自己更快释放S3和智壳，但感觉拖到那时候，已经不好打了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"TSIJAbZD9WeHddmz","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_718/h_204/50364/253894/2025/8/23/739469.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"678px","height":"193px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大加强。 提升了伤害，能驱散2个了buff了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"ianAHA0QvBWwx0eV","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_722/h_203/50364/253894/2025/8/23/74185.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"722px","height":"203px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大加强，效果抵抗和减伤都很棒，但启动有点慢啊，进肉队感觉挡不住核爆。但肉队内战应该很强。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"koeo3kLcvJdRBurp","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_723/h_331/50364/253894/2025/8/23/66583.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"723px","height":"331px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"超级加强，说不定能从不入流冲到T1。本来的缺点就是S3一段伤害容易被抵抗，现在多了一段，还新增抵抗下降，无敌了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"3SPP3ZTAuKGeM6Gr","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_704/h_143/50364/253894/2025/8/23/238673.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"704px","height":"143px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":" 小加强。加攻是用于核爆队的，但是没其他功能性，所以不强。现在加了净化，但感觉不如加控制或推拉条。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"jHMbjoWODfJSVpfI","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_716/h_303/50364/253894/2025/8/23/735179.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"716px","height":"303px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小加强。加了伤害，但无法解决容易被净化的问题，伤害也不是特别高。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"QNYpU10QT0ujGnBn","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_706/h_264/50364/253894/2025/8/23/956012.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"706px","height":"264px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"中等加强，加了保护能力，能打肉队了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"ybrE8dpbw56x4UX9","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_718/h_140/50364/253894/2025/8/23/152992.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"718px","height":"140px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小加强，加了伤害，但还是不好操作，不如玩别的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"5uVckrS9HbrHA61b","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_706/h_110/50364/253894/2025/8/23/647507.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"706px","height":"110px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小加强，提升了8%的输出，但还是无法解决连击不稳定并且伤害不高的问题。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"IDPdjHVjOfaQiZoi","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_714/h_204/50364/253894/2025/8/23/3111.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"714px","height":"204px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大削弱。大大减少了控制能力和推条。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"6gck4qi6op5RGsjT","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_711/h_116/50364/253894/2025/8/23/832530.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"711px","height":"116px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大加强，多净化一个减益，净化3个就是75%抵抗。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"14nDEBoXeBVqS7lN","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_682/h_109/50364/253894/2025/8/23/257098.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"682px","height":"109px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"中等加强，增伤更快。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"QrgZ8zL4DDwA74bk","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_676/h_88/50364/253894/2025/8/23/426856.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"676px","height":"88px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"大加强，更稳定了。肉队可带"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"Br0or7ZMR2pcVF0R","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_709/h_172/50364/253894/2025/8/23/455555.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"709px","height":"172px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"中等削弱，带了万魔不能快速解决战斗，后面更难打了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"jvKfx1A2AibtPzNY","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_707/h_171/50364/253894/2025/8/23/86035.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"707px","height":"171px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"肉队削弱。"}]}]
